name: custom-evals
description: Custom evaluation suite for testing diverse build-slides skill scenarios

prompts.name: pitch-tech-startup
prompts.prompt: Create a 5-slide pitch deck for an AI-powered customer support startup targeting venture capital investors. Include: problem statement, solution, market size, team, and funding ask.
prompts.description: Tests structured business narrative and professional hierarchy

prompts.name: marketing-campaign
prompts.prompt: Design a 4-slide marketing overview for a new SaaS product launch. Include value proposition, key features, pricing tiers, and call to action.
prompts.description: Tests marketing content with visual appeal and clear hierarchy

prompts.name: training-python
prompts.prompt: Build an 8-slide training presentation on Python basics. Cover: intro, variables, data types, operators, control flow, functions, and summary.
prompts.description: Tests handling of technical educational content with code examples

prompts.name: quarterly-financial
prompts.prompt: Create a 10-slide quarterly financial review. Include revenue trends, expense breakdown, profit margins, key metrics, and forward guidance.
prompts.description: Tests handling of data-heavy financial presentations

prompts.name: product-roadmap
prompts.prompt: Design a 6-slide product roadmap presentation. Show Q1-Q3 priorities, key features planned, timeline, resource allocation, and success metrics.

prompts.name: climate-data
prompts.prompt: Build a 3-slide overview of global climate data. Include temperature trends, carbon emissions, and projected impacts with visual emphasis.

prompts.name: company-culture
prompts.prompt: Create a 7-slide company culture presentation for new hires. Cover values, mission, team structure, benefits, onboarding, and career growth.
prompts.description: Tests employee-focused content with cultural messaging

prompts.name: technical-architecture
prompts.prompt: Design a 12-slide technical architecture overview. Include system components, data flow, API design, security considerations, and scalability approach.
prompts.description: Tests complex technical content and diagram representation

prompts.name: event-proposal
prompts.prompt: Build a 4-slide conference talk proposal. Include abstract, key takeaways, audience level, and speaker bio.
prompts.description: Tests proposal format with concise messaging

prompts.name: minimal-brief
prompts.prompt: Create slides about digital transformation. Keep it simple and professional.

prompts.name: text-heavy
prompts.prompt: Create a 5-slide detailed technical specification document for a real-time data processing system. Each slide should be comprehensive with multiple bullet points.
prompts.description: Tests handling of text-heavy content without overflow

prompts.name: image-heavy
prompts.prompt: Design a 6-slide visual portfolio of sustainable architecture projects. Emphasize imagery, minimal text, professional layout.
prompts.description: Tests visual composition and spacing with imagery focus
